title: A new support branch for Orlando Pirates in Plett
bodyText: [{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event will begin with a breakfast at 11:30 at Bossiesgif 11177, followed by a roadshow and lunch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
